final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-panel knowledge card illustration for children, presenting the story of 赤壁之战 from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a "儿童卡通知识卡片" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 中国小学生历史漫画 print tradition (e.g. 《漫画三国》), Usborne illustrated history cards for young readers, DK Eyewitness children's infographic spreads; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at the top, story cartoon scene as the main body, and a bulleted key-points list arranged alongside the illustration
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story — key figures (曹操, 周瑜, 诸葛亮), the fire attack on the fleet (火攻), and the battle on the 长江 river
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic river battle scene with warships, fire, and smoke on the 长江
Lighting/mood: needs a vivid, energetic, child-friendly adventure atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs bright, saturated, child-friendly colors — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include title "赤壁之战" (large, top), and key-point bullet labels: "• 时间：公元208年" / "• 主要人物：曹操、周瑜、诸葛亮" / "• 战术：火攻连环船" / "• 结果：曹操大败，三国鼎立格局形成"
Constraints: must be a single card panel; key-points list must be clearly legible alongside the cartoon scene
Avoid: overly realistic or adult-oriented illustration styles; cluttered or illegible text layout
